description: Garchi CMS is a cloud-based headless CMS for managing structured content, pages, assets, and data items for websites and applications. It also provides an MCP server so AI clients can work with the same content model through governed tools.
summary: Garchi exposes a REST API at `https://garchi.co.uk/api/v2` authenticated by bearer API tokens, plus OAuth-protected MCP server endpoints at `https://garchi.co.uk/mcp` and `https://garchi.co.uk/mcp-oauth`.
